usage: Visible focus indicator around the parent control
screen_reader_exposure: Do not expose as a standalone target
announcement_pattern: Announce the parent role and focus, e.g. 'Story node, button, focused.'
notes: Use as redundant non-color focus cue; keep 3:1 non-text contrast against surrounding UI.

usage: Visible selected-state indicator on the parent control
screen_reader_exposure: Do not expose as a standalone target
announcement_pattern: Announce the parent state, e.g. 'Package node, selected.'
notes: Use with visible text/state in UI; avoid color-only selection feedback.

usage: Visible targeting indicator for the active target
screen_reader_exposure: Do not expose as a standalone target
announcement_pattern: Announce the parent control state, e.g. 'Badge Clerk, targeted enemy.'
notes: Keep shape distinct from selected state; do not rely on motion to communicate targeting.

usage: Visible locked-state overlay on unavailable content
screen_reader_exposure: Do not expose as a standalone target
announcement_pattern: Announce the parent state, e.g. 'Executive Threats, locked, undiscovered.'
notes: Pair with visible copy when possible; preserve enough contrast over busy art.

usage: Visible fresh-state marker for newly logged or newly unlocked content
screen_reader_exposure: Do not expose as a standalone target
announcement_pattern: Announce the parent state, e.g. 'Archive record, new.' or 'Root Access Shard, new unlock.'
notes: Symbol-only by design to avoid baked text; UI should supply the actual words 'New' or equivalent.
